name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-common

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Common SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Common SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common common
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.common.common_client.CommonClient.__init__
documentation:
---
param credential: "\u63A5\u53E3\u8C03\u7528\u51ED\u8BC1"
param profile: "\u8BF7\u6C42\u7F51\u7EDC\u4FE1\u606F"
param region: "\u63A5\u53E3\u8C03\u7528\u5730\u57DF"
param service: "\u63A5\u53E3\u4EA7\u54C1"
param version: "\u63A5\u53E3\u7248\u672C"
type credential: tencentcloud.common.credential.Credential or tencentcloud.common.credential.STSAssumeRoleCredential
  or None
type profile: tencentcloud.common.profile.client_profile.ClientProfile
type region: str
type service: str
type version: str
---

使用CommonClient，可以只安装tencentcloud-sdk-python-common包，即可调用各个产品的接口
使用详情见github示例

methods.name: tencentcloud.common.profile.http_profile.HttpProfile.__init__
documentation:
HTTP profile.
\:param protocol: http or https, default is https.
\:type protocol: str
\:param endpoint: The domain to access, like: cvm.tencentcloudapi.com
\:type endpoint: str
\:param reqMethod: the http method, valid choice: GET, POST
\:type reqMethod: str
\:param reqTimeout: The http timeout in second.
\:type reqTimeout: int
\:param rootDomain: The root domain to access, like: tencentcloudapi.com.
\:type rootDomain: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.common.profile.client_profile.RegionBreakerProfile.__init__
documentation:
RegionBreaker profile.

```
param backup_endpoint

Backup region of endpoint, default ap-guangzhou.tencentcloudapi.com.

type backup_endpoint

str

param max_fail_num

Max failure to trigger breaker, default 5.

type max_fail_num

int

param max_fail_percent

Max failure percent to trigger breaker, default 0.75.

type max_fail_percent

float

param window_interval

Decides when to reset counter if the state is StateClosed, default 5 minutes.

type window_interval

int

param timeout

Decides when to turn StateOpen to StateHalfOpen, default 1 minutes.

type timeout

int

param max_requests

Decides when to turn StateHalfOpen to StateClosed, default 5 successful requests.

type timeout

int
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.common.credential.Credential.__init__
documentation:
Tencent Cloud Credentials.

Access <https://console.cloud.tencent.com/cam/capi> to manage your
credentials.

```
param secret_id

The secret id of your credential.

type secret_id

str

param secret_key

The secret key of your credential.

type secret_key

str

param token

The federation token of your credential, if this field
is specified, secret_id and secret_key should be set
accordingly, see: https://cloud.tencent.com/document/product/598/13896
```

classes.name: tencentcloud.common.credential.STSAssumeRoleCredential

methods.name: tencentcloud.common.credential.STSAssumeRoleCredential.__init__
documentation:
---
param secret_id: "\u63A5\u53E3\u8C03\u7528\u51ED\u8BC1id"
param secret_key: "\u63A5\u53E3\u8C03\u7528\u51ED\u8BC1key"
type secret_id: str
type secret_key: str
---

<https://cloud.tencent.com/document/api/1312/48197>
\:param role_arn: 角色的资源描述，参考官网文档 <https://cloud.tencent.com/document/api/1312/48197> 中 RoleArn 参数的描述。
\:type role_arn: str
\:param role_session_name: 临时会话名称，由用户自定义名称
\:type role_session_name: str
\:param duration_seconds: 获取临时凭证的有效期，默认7200s
\:type duration_seconds: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.common.credential.STSAssumeRoleCredential._need_refresh
documentation:
<https://cloud.tencent.com/document/api/1312/48197>
此函数自动使用初始secret_id和secret_key，自动调用上述链接中获取临时凭证的接口，并返回临时凭证

```
param role_arn

角色的资源描述，上述链接RoleArn参数中有详细获取方式

type role_arn

str

param role_session_name

临时会话名称，由用户自定义名称

type role_session_name

str

param duration_seconds

获取临时凭证的有效期，默认7200s

type duration_seconds

int
```

使用STSAssumeRoleCredential，制动role，
可以自动生成临时凭证，并使用临时凭证调用接口

methods.name: tencentcloud.common.credential.EnvironmentVariableCredential.get_credential
documentation:
Tencent Cloud EnvironmentVariableCredential.

Access <https://console.cloud.tencent.com/cam/capi> to manage your
credentials.

```
param secret_id

The secret id of your credential, get by environment variable TENCENTCLOUD_SECRET_ID

type secret_id

str

param secret_key

The secret key of your credential. get by environment variable TENCENTCLOUD_SECRET_KEY

type secret_key

str
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.common.credential.ProfileCredential.get_credential
documentation:
Tencent Cloud ProfileCredential.

Access <https://console.cloud.tencent.com/cam/capi> to manage your credentials.

default file position is "~/.tencentcloud/credentials" or "/etc/tencentcloud/credentials", it is ini format.
such as:
[default]
secret_id=""
secret_key=""

```
param secret_id

The secret id of your credential.

type secret_id

str

param secret_key

The secret key of your credential.

type secret_key

str
```

classes.name: tencentcloud.common.credential.DefaultCredentialProvider
documentation:
Tencent Cloud DefaultCredentialProvider.

DefaultCredentialProvider will search credential by order EnvironmentVariableCredential ProfileCredential
and CVMRoleCredential.

methods.name: tencentcloud.common.abstract_client.AbstractClient._get_multipart_body

methods.name: tencentcloud.common.abstract_client.AbstractClient.call_octet_stream
documentation:
Invoke API with application/ocet-stream content-type.

Note:
1\. only specific API can be invoked in such manner.
2\. only TC3-HMAC-SHA256 signature method can be specified.
3\. only POST request method can be specified

```
type action

str

param action

Specific API action name.

type headers

dict

param headers

Header parameters for this API.

type body

bytes

param body

Bytes of requested body
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.common.abstract_client.AbstractClient.call_json
documentation:
Call api with json object and return with json object.

```
type action

str

param action

api name e.g. DescribeInstances

type params

dict

param params

params with this action

type headers

dict

param headers

request header, like {"X-TC-TraceId": "ffe0c072-8a5d-4e17-8887-a8a60252abca"}

type options

dict

param options

request options, like {"SkipSign": False, "IsMultipart": False, "IsOctetStream": False, "BinaryParams": []}
```
